urdu transliteration text: NAY BOLEYA SAARE RASTE VICHHOREYA SUNDA TILAAWATE SHAADI
english translation text: SAJJAD (AS) DID NOT SPEAK THE WHOLE JOURNEY, AS HE LISTENED TO THE TRAGEDY OF HIS FATHER

urdu transliteration text: BAUW AANKHI NIBHAYI AABID (AS) NE HAY MANZIL SHAAM DE RAA DI
english translation text: HE WEPT THE WHOLE WAY TO SHAAM AND FINISHED THE JOURNEY WITH GREAT DIFFICULTY

urdu transliteration text:
KADI VEKHE NAUKE SINA DE VAL
KADI YAAD AAVE BAQIYA DI
english translation text: ZAINAB (SA) WOULD LOOK TOWARDS THE HEAD OF IMAM HUSSEIN (AS) ON THE SPEAR AND SHE WOULD REMEMBER BAQI

urdu transliteration text: KAVE SUNKE SHAUR SHARABIYAN DA HAY KISMAT AUN DI MA DI
english translation text:
AND THEN SHE WOULD HEAR THE MISCHIEF OF THE DRUNKARDS
OH THE FATE OF THE MOTHER OF AUN (AS)..
